globalHeaders.content-security-policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.azurestaticapps.net https://*.azurewebsites.net; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests
